chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1013 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. FRESH CASE 1.For orders on CMA 4214/23 2.For orders on CMA 4215/23 3.For orders on CMA 4216/23 4.For hearing of main case 13-06-2023 Mr. Agha Faraz Khan, Advocate along with both petitioners. ***** 1. Urgency is granted. 2-4. Both petitioners are present. The girl petitioner has shown us her identity card and is an adult. She states that her husband Fazal-ur- Rehman (petitioner No.2) is known to her and she contracted marriage with him on her own accord and without any pressure, coercion or compulsion. Although we cannot conduct an extensive enquiry in the writ jurisdiction of this Court, prima facie, it appears that this is not a case of trafficking. FIR No.73 of 2023 of P.S, Baberloi-Khairpur has been lodged. I.O of the case shall record statement of the girl petitioner and file statement along with supplementary Challan before learned Magistrate who is seized of the matter. Learned Magistrate shall then apply his independent mind and act in accordance with law. No arrest shall take place in Crime No.73 of 2023 until learned Magistrate has taken a decision on the same. It is hoped and expected that learned Magistrate shall do the needful within two weeks. This order Page 2 of 2 restraining the arrest of any nominated accused pursuant to above FIR shall remain in field for a period of two weeks. In the meantime, the police shall render requisite protection to the petitioners. Instant petition along with listed applications stands disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
